title: Roll the Dice on These 3 Gambling Stocks for Big-Win Potential
text: With both the Chinese gambling hub of Macau and Las Vegas casinos doing very well, this is an excellent time to buy the top gambling stocks. In Macau, gross gaming revenue (GGR) soared 400% last month versus the same period in 2022 to $2.42 billion.

title: MGM RESORTS UNVEILS VISION FOR MGM EMPIRE CITY
text: If Granted Full-Scale Commercial Casino License, Empire City Casino b y  MGM Resorts Will Transition into MGM Empire City; MGM Empire City Will Feature World-Class Entertainment Venue,  Exciting New Dining Experiences and More  Additional images and sizzle reel available at https://bit.ly/MGMEmpireCity YONKERS, N.Y. , Nov. 30, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) today unveiled its vision to transition Empire City Casino by MGM Resorts into a world-class entertainment destination, MGM Empire City, if awarded a commercial casino license for its historic Yonkers, New York site.

title: BetMGM Business Update Event Details

title: 7 Best Travel Stocks to Buy Ahead of Travel Tuesday
text: The search for the best travel stocks is heating up. With September showing an impressive $104 billion in travel spending and a steady 3.5% growth year-to-date (YTD), the sector shows potential for growth even in challenging economic conditions.

title: MGM Resorts International Named as Leading Employer for Veterans by Military Times
text: LAS VEGAS , Nov. 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") has been recognized as one of the nation's leading employers for culture, recruitment and policies for Veterans, service members and military families in Military Times' Best for Vets: Employers list. MGM Resorts was again the highest-ranked company overall in Nevada and a top-ranked hospitality company in the nation.

title: MGM Resorts International Chief Financial Officer to Speak at the Bank of America Leveraged Finance Conference
text: LAS VEGAS , Nov. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") will participate in the Bank of America Leveraged Finance Conference on Tuesday, November 28, 2023. MGM Resorts CFO and Treasurer Jonathan Halkyard will speak at a session scheduled to begin at 3:30 p.m.

title: MGM Resorts International Recognized for Superior Achievement in Creating an Inclusive Workplace
text: LAS VEGAS , Nov. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") has been named a Pinnacle Inclusion Index Company in the 2023 Seramount Inclusion Index. Renowned as the preeminent organization for diversity thought leaders to share best practices and develop innovative solutions for cultural change, Seramount's recognition underscores MGM Resorts' commitment to advancing diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) across its operations.

title: Wall Street Awaits CPI Data
text: The two-week rally off late-October lows seems to have cooled off this week, especially on the small-cap Russell 2000 but also on the S&P 500, which is now lower for the last trading month. Pre-market futures are up again today, but this is before Fed officials are given another microphone today to explain to everyone that the monetary policy body may not be done raising interest rates.

title: MGM Resorts International (MGM) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Andrew Chapman - Director, IR William Hornbuckle - CEO and President Jonathan Halkyard - CFO Corey Sanders - COO Hubert Wang - President and Chief Operating Officer of MGM China Conference Call Participants Joseph Greff - JPMorgan Daniel Politzer - Wells Fargo Carlo Santarelli - Deutsche Bank Shaun Kelley - Bank of America David Katz - Jefferies Robin Farley - UBS Barry Jonas - Truist Securities John DeCree - CBRE Securities Chad Beynon - Macquarie Research Jordan Bender - JMP Securities Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to the MGM Resorts International Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. Joining the call from the company today are Bill Hornbuckle, Chief Executive Officer and President; Corey Sanders, Chief Operating Officer; Jonathan Halkyard, Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer; Hubert Wang, President and Chief Operating Officer of MGM China; and Andrew Chapman, Director of Investor Relations.

title: MGM Resorts Expects Continued Growth and Expansion of Online Gaming
text: MGM Resorts International achieved its first quarter of profitability on its investment in the online gaming joint venture, BetMGM.  The company's 50% share of operating income in the third quarter was $13 million, and executives expect that business to continue to grow, according to a presentation released Wednesday (Nov. 8) in conjunction with the company's quarterly earnings call.

title: MGM Resorts launches $2B share buyback as 3Q results showcase profit

text: MGM Resorts International's diverse revenue streams make it the most resilient gaming company against a potential recession. title: Tens of thousands of Las Vegas Strip hotel workers may on go strike this month
text: LAS VEGAS — Tens of thousands of Las Vegas hotel workers set a deadline Thursday for a sweeping strike, threatening major disruptions to the city's economic backbone that could coincide with the Strip's inaugural Formula 1 races later this month.

title: MGM Resorts Teams with USO and American Airlines for 13th Annual Salute to the Troops at Mandalay Bay
text: More than 100 wounded warriors  and their guests to visit Las Vegas over Veterans Day weekend LAS VEGAS , Nov. 2, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- MGM Resorts International (NYSE: MGM) ("MGM Resorts" or the "Company") will host the United Service Organizations (USO) Experience: Salute to the Troops, honoring more than 100 active-duty service members who have been injured in the line of duty beginning Friday, November 10. Now in its 13th year, the five-day celebration will take place at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino.
